data.description:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Whitbread ( (GB:WTB) ) has provided an update.

Whitbread PLC announced a transaction involving Kal Atwal, an Independent Non-Executive Director, who purchased and simultaneously sold 1,130 ordinary shares, resulting in no change in overall holding. This transaction, conducted in London, reflects routine financial activities by a company executive and may have implications for investor perceptions and market confidence in the company’s governance.

More about Whitbread

Whitbread PLC is a prominent company in the hospitality industry, known for its hotels and restaurants. It primarily operates and franchises well-known brands such as Premier Inn and various restaurant chains, focusing on providing quality accommodations and dining experiences.

data.title: Altea Green Power Reports Robust 2024 Financial Growth and Strategic Expansion
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest update is out from Altea Green Power S.p.A. ( (IT:AGP) ).

Altea Green Power S.p.A. announced significant growth in its financial results for 2024, with revenues and EBITDA more than doubling compared to 2023, reflecting the company’s solid business model amid a challenging geopolitical context. The company’s strategic milestones, including a translisting on Euronext STAR Milan, have strengthened its investor relationships, and it anticipates continued growth through investments and the development of new BESS projects, with an order backlog exceeding €150 million and a pipeline capacity over 3 GW.

More about Altea Green Power S.p.A.

Altea Green Power S.p.A. operates in the renewable energy sector, focusing on the development and construction of green energy plants. The company is involved in traditional renewable energy projects such as photovoltaic and wind energy, as well as Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) projects to support energy modulation needs of the national electricity grid.

data.title: Frasers Group Withdraws Offer for XXL ASA Shares
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

XXL ASA ( (GB:0R3P) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Frasers Group plc has decided not to proceed with its intended voluntary cash offer for all outstanding shares of XXL ASA at NOK 10 per share. This decision was influenced by the lack of support from other large shareholders of XXL, which made it unlikely for Frasers to acquire more than 50% of XXL’s shares, thereby failing to meet one of the conditions for the offer.

More about XXL ASA

Frasers Group plc, originally founded as a small store in Maidenhead in 1982, has grown into a global retail powerhouse. Rebranded from Sports Direct International in 2019, Frasers focuses on providing access to premium sports, luxury brands, and is dedicated to driving digital innovation in the retail industry.

data.title: Costamare Inc. Releases 2024 Annual Financial Report
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An announcement from Costamare ( (CMRE) ) is now available.

Costamare Inc. announced on February 20, 2025, the filing of its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2024, with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The report, which contains the company’s complete audited financial statements for 2024, is available on Costamare’s website. This announcement underscores the company’s commitment to transparency and provides stakeholders with valuable insights into its financial health and strategic positioning in the shipping industry.

More about Costamare

Costamare Inc. is a leading global owner and provider of containerships and dry bulk vessels for charter, with a 51-year history in the international shipping industry. The company operates a fleet of 68 containerships and 38 dry bulk vessels, alongside a dry bulk operating platform and a lease financing business. Costamare’s stocks are traded on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbols CMRE, CMRE PR B, CMRE PR C, and CMRE PR D.

data.title: Magyar Bancorp Reports Strong 2024 Financial Performance
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest announcement is out from Magyar Bancorp ( (MGYR) ).

Magyar Bancorp, Inc. announced a strong financial performance for 2024, highlighting a 5.5% increase in deposits, 12% loan growth, and a rise in earnings per share to $1.23. The company also reported enhanced shareholder returns through increased dividend payments and an active stock buyback program, while being recognized as a high-performing bank with a 5-star Bauer Financial rating and inclusion in the 2024 KBW Honor Roll. The company’s commitment to growth and enhanced liquidity is underscored by strategic expansions, such as opening a new branch in Martinsville and closing its Bridgewater office.

More about Magyar Bancorp

Magyar Bancorp, Inc. is a New Jersey-based financial institution that operates through its subsidiary, Magyar Bank, a chartered savings bank founded in 1922. The company, listed on NASDAQ under the symbol MGYR, offers community banking services through a network of branches in New Jersey, managing $1 billion in assets, $805 million in loans, and $849 million in deposits as of December 31, 2024.

  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

SigmaRoc ( (GB:SRC) ) has provided an announcement.

SigmaRoc PLC, a company involved in manufacturing and construction materials, has reported a change in its voting rights structure. Rettig Oy Ab, based in Helsinki, Finland, has reduced its voting rights in SigmaRoc from 4.5% to 3.97% as of February 18, 2025. This change may impact the company’s decision-making process and influence from significant shareholders.

data.title: Dividend Select 15 Corp. Declares March 2025 Dividend
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Dividend Select 15 ( (TSE:DS) ) has shared an update.

Dividend Select 15 Corp. has announced a monthly dividend of $0.05667 per Equity share, payable on March 10, 2025, to shareholders on record as of February 28, 2025. The dividend is determined by applying a 10% annualized rate on the volume-weighted average market price of the shares, maintaining a stable yield for its investors, and marking a total of $10.88 per share distributed since inception.

More about Dividend Select 15

Dividend Select 15 Corp. focuses on investing in a diverse portfolio of 15 Canadian companies, chosen from a broader universe of 20 prominent dividend-yielding stocks. The company’s primary goal is to provide consistent dividend income to its shareholders by investing in high-yield Canadian stocks across various industries.

An update from Coca-Cola Europacific Partners ( (CCEP) ) is now available.

Coca-Cola Europacific Partners announced the acquisition of ordinary shares by several of its key executives under the UK Share Plan. The transactions involve multiple senior figures, including the Chief Financial Officer, Chief Information Officer, and General Counsel, indicating a significant engagement in company equity. This move reflects a strategic step in aligning the interests of the company’s leadership with its shareholders and might enhance the company’s market positioning by reinforcing executive commitment.

More about Coca-Cola Europacific Partners

Coca-Cola Europacific Partners plc operates in the beverage industry, providing a wide range of non-alcoholic drinks. As one of the largest independent Coca-Cola bottlers, the company serves markets across Europe and the Asia-Pacific region, focusing on delivering Coca-Cola branded beverages and other leading brands to consumers.
